overall.description: First-person walking tour through a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera navigates street intersections, passes under elevated highways, and approaches a public park entrance. High-quality game engine footage with warm sunset lighting and modern architecture.

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection onto a street with a rocky hillside on the left. The camera continues walking toward the entrance of Arroyo Canyon Public Park, passing the digital park sign. The environment transitions from dense urban to a more natural park setting with increased vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit cyberpunk city that gradually transitions from a dense urban intersection into a natural park setting. It begins by crossing a bright street lined with palm trees and modern buildings, passing a green utility truck before turning toward a massive elevated highway structure. As the camera moves along the concrete sidewalk beneath the highway, it passes a red sports car and emerges onto an open boulevard bathed in intense, backlit golden hour light. The scene then expands past the futuristic 07 building and a large digital billboard advertising WIDE OPEN, maintaining a warm glow as vehicles drive alongside. Finally, the camera turns left at an intersection, moving past a rocky hillside and a digital sign toward the entrance of Arroyo Canyon Public Park, where the architecture gives way to increased vegetation.
